_comment: Curated, verifiable fully-funded undergrad opportunities by category. official_url checked live by verify.py. deadline_raw null = rolling/annual; set ISO date when known.

opportunities.program: DAAD WISE — Working Internships in Science & Engineering
opportunities.funding: Monthly stipend (~861 EUR) + travel + insurance subsidy
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduates (from 3rd semester) in STEM, outside Germany
opportunities.description: Summer research internships at German universities for STEM undergraduates.

opportunities.funding: Fully funded 12-week internship: stipend, airfare, housing support
opportunities.eligibility: Senior undergraduates in STEM from eligible countries
opportunities.description: Fully funded 12-week research internship at top Canadian universities.

opportunities.funding: Subsistence allowance, travel, accommodation support
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduates in physics, engineering, computing, maths
opportunities.description: Spend your summer doing physics & engineering alongside CERN scientists.

opportunities.organization: Okinawa Institute of Science and Technology
opportunities.funding: Stipend, travel to/from OIST, accommodation/commuting support
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduate & graduate students in science & technology
opportunities.description: Hands-on lab research internship at OIST in Okinawa, Japan.

opportunities.funding: Monthly stipend, housing, transport, medical insurance
opportunities.description: Funded research stay at KAUST with stipend, housing and travel.

opportunities.funding: Monthly stipend + travel for summer research placements
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduates in biology, chemistry, physics, engineering, CS
opportunities.description: Summer research placements in Germany mentored by PhD students.

opportunities.funding: Award/stipend (~$6,000+) for 10-week summer research
opportunities.description: 10-week Caltech summer research fellowship with a faculty mentor.

opportunities.funding: Fully funded summer research: stipend, travel, housing
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduate students in science & biotech fields
opportunities.description: Premier funded summer research program in science and biotech.

opportunities.funding: Salary for ~2 months + travel & accommodation support
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduate/Master's students in CS or related
opportunities.description: Two-month computer-science research fellowship at ETH Zurich.

opportunities.funding: Competitive salary + travel + accommodation support
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduates in CS, communication systems, STEM
opportunities.description: Paid summer research internship at EPFL's school of computer science.

opportunities.funding: Stipend, travel, housing for 9-week research
opportunities.description: MIT summer research for undergrads underrepresented in their field.

opportunities.program: Indian Academy of Sciences Summer Research Fellowship
opportunities.funding: Stipend + travel for 2-month research placement
opportunities.description: Two-month research fellowship working with Indian academy scientists.

opportunities.funding: Fully funded research stay in the USA: stipend, airfare, housing
opportunities.description: Funded US research semester for Indian STEM undergraduates.

opportunities.funding: Fully funded US summer research: stipend, travel, lodging
opportunities.description: Funded US summer research for Indian science & engineering students.

opportunities.program: Weizmann Institute International Summer Science Program
opportunities.funding: Funded summer research, travel & accommodation
opportunities.description: International summer science program at the Weizmann Institute.

opportunities.funding: Stipend (~$6,000+) for 10-week research, housing support
opportunities.description: Caltech research fellowship for underrepresented STEM students.

opportunities.funding: Stipend (size varies by country) for open-source project
opportunities.eligibility: Newcomers to open source 18+, incl. undergraduates
opportunities.description: Get paid to contribute to open-source software over the summer.

opportunities.funding: Paid 12-week software engineering internship
opportunities.description: Google's paid software internship for 1st/2nd-year students.

opportunities.funding: Stipend for 12-week remote open-source / SE program
opportunities.description: 12-week remote software engineering & open-source fellowship.

opportunities.funding: Paid (US$7,000) remote open-source internship
opportunities.description: Paid remote internships for people underrepresented in tech.

opportunities.funding: Stipend, travel & accommodation for 9 weeks in computing/AI
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduates in CS, engineering, physics, maths
opportunities.description: Summer computing & AI internship at CERN openlab.

opportunities.funding: Paid internship + mentorship for early undergraduates
opportunities.description: Meta's paid engineering program for early undergraduates.

opportunities.funding: Scholarship + paid SDE internship pathway
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduate CS students from underrepresented groups
opportunities.description: Scholarship plus a paid software-engineer internship pathway at Amazon.

opportunities.funding: Stipend for open-source Bitcoin engineering/design project
opportunities.description: Stipend to build open-source Bitcoin software over the summer.

opportunities.funding: Full tuition, monthly stipend, airfare, settlement & language
opportunities.description: Fully funded Korean government undergraduate scholarship.

opportunities.funding: Full tuition, monthly stipend, airfare
opportunities.description: Japanese government scholarship: tuition, monthly stipend & airfare.

opportunities.funding: Full tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend, insurance
opportunities.description: Chinese government scholarship for international undergraduates.

opportunities.funding: Full tuition, monthly stipend, accommodation, airfare
opportunities.description: Türkiye's fully funded scholarship for international students.

opportunities.funding: Full tuition, monthly stipend, accommodation, insurance
opportunities.description: Hungarian government scholarship with full tuition & stipend.

opportunities.funding: Full tuition + living stipend for STEM undergraduates
opportunities.description: Full scholarship for international STEM undergraduates at KAIST.

opportunities.funding: Monthly stipend + tuition waiver

opportunities.funding: Full tuition, monthly allowance, airfare, accommodation

opportunities.funding: Funded participation: travel & accommodation for young researchers

opportunities.funding: Scholarship: registration, travel & hotel for the conference
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduate women & non-binary students in computing
opportunities.description: Scholarship to the world's largest gathering of women in tech.

opportunities.funding: Scholarship covering registration, travel & lodging
opportunities.description: Funded diversity-in-computing conference for students.

opportunities.program: St. Gallen Symposium — Leaders of Tomorrow
opportunities.funding: Fully funded participation incl. travel for selected students
opportunities.description: Win an essay contest to join global leaders at St. Gallen.

opportunities.funding: Scholarship: summit access, accommodation, meals (travel varies)
opportunities.description: Scholarship to the One Young World global leadership summit.

opportunities.funding: Travel grant to the global finale in Berlin for finalists
opportunities.eligibility: Undergraduates onward with a research/idea pitch
opportunities.description: Pitch your research idea for a trip to the Falling Walls finale.

opportunities.funding: Funding support & funded meeting attendance for selected students
